title: GrowGeneration (GRWG) Q4 2025 Earnings Transcript
text: GrowGeneration Q4 2025 Earnings Results. Q4 2025 Performance: Sales: $37.8 million. Gross profit: $9.1 million. Gross margin: 24.1% (up from 16.4%). Full Year 2025 Results: Revenue: $161.7 million. Gross profit margin: 26.8% (370 basis point improvement). Adjusted EBITDA: Improved 58.9% year-over-year. GAAP net loss: Reduced by more than half. Proprietary Brands: Q4 penetration: 35.8% of cultivation and gardening revenue (up from 30.4%). Full year: 32.8% of segment (up from 24.2%). Proprietary brand sales: $44 million, 11.3% increase. Balance Sheet: Cash: $46.1 million. Zero debt. Share Buyback: Authorized $10 million repurchase program. 2026 Guidance: Revenue: Roughly flat at $162-168 million. Adjusted EBITDA: Target breakeven. Results demonstrate significant progress toward profitability with strong margin expansion and proprietary brand growth.
